propositions: The auto-lander service and all its cloud/host resources are being decommissioned because they are unused and incur cost.

Repo cleanup removes the autolander Dockerfile, compose service, autoheal sidecar, external volumes, secret fetch, deploy paths, terraform monitoring, SSM param, nginx status location, and observability marker.

Live teardown stops and removes the autolander/autoheal containers and gerrit_autolander* volumes, then destroys the rebar-autolander-errors CloudWatch alarm and the autolander-gerrit-token SSM parameter.

Deploy ordering matters: the code change removing the token fetch must reach the host before terraform destroys the SSM param, otherwise fetch-secrets.sh fail-fasts on a blank token during boot/redeploy.
The infra-only change's CI was blocked by a flaky wall-clock test_warm_resolution_is_cheap, requiring a stacked flakefix to relax the timing ceiling.
Acceptance requires no autolander container/volumes/alarm/SSM param remaining, an empty terraform plan after apply, and a clean host stack.
